title: Dynamic Video Scene Merging & Visualization
activities: START
parse_args(): collect input_dirs (nargs=+), strides (nargs=+, int, required), output_dir (required)
main(): call process_and_concat(args.input_dirs, args.strides, args.output_dir)
process_and_concat(): validate len(strides) == len(input_dirs) → raise ValueError if mismatch
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
Collect mp4s(d): list .mp4 files in each input_dir
Compute common_files = set.intersection of all mp4 sets
[DECISION] common_files empty? → print warning and RETURN (early exit)
tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix='stride_concat_') → temp_root
FOR each filename in sorted(common_files): [loop start]
ffprobe_fps(ref_input): probe avg_frame_rate via ffprobe subprocess
[DECISION] avg_frame_rate in ('0/0', '', 'N/A')? → probe r_frame_rate instead
[DECISION] Fraction(val) parseable? → return float(fps) ELSE fallback fps=30.0
FOR each (dir_i, stride_i) in zip(input_dirs, strides): [inner loop]
Build seg temp path: temp_root/NN__dirname__filename
subsample_one(inp, stride, seg, fps): run ffmpeg with select/setpts/fps filter + libx264 encode
Append seg to processed list
[inner loop end]
Write concat list file (list_path): for each seg write 'file <escaped_abs_path>'
escape_concat_path(p): wrap path in single-quotes, escape embedded single-quotes
Run ffmpeg concat command: -f concat -safe 0 -i list_path -c copy → out_path
[loop end]
[FINALLY] shutil.rmtree(temp_root, ignore_errors=True): cleanup temp dir
END

functions.name: process_and_concat
functions.signature: process_and_concat(input_dirs: list[str], strides: list[int], output_dir: str) -> None
functions.flow_notes: try/finally ensures temp_root cleanup even on ffmpeg failure

functions.name: escape_concat_path
functions.logic: wraps path in single quotes; replaces internal ' with '\''
functions.used_by: process_and_concat when writing ffmpeg concat list file

functions.name: subsample_one
functions.signature: subsample_one(input_path: str, stride: int, temp_path: str, target_fps: float) -> None

conditions: len(strides) != len(input_dirs) → raise ValueError (guard before processing)
common_files is empty → print and return early
avg_frame_rate in ('0/0','','N/A') → fall back to r_frame_rate
Fraction(val) raises exception → fps defaults to 30.0
external_dependencies: ffmpeg (subprocess): frame subsampling encode + concat demuxer copy
important_notes: All temp files written to mkdtemp dir and removed in finally block. ffmpeg concat uses -safe 0 to allow absolute paths. Audio is stripped during subsampling to prevent desync. Script is CLI-executable via __main__ guard.
